title: Constanța、Constanța — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Constanța、Constanțaの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

ConstanțaはConstanțaにある人口283,872の都市です。Romania’s oldest continuously inhabited city and main Black Sea port, with ancient Roman ruins, sandy beaches, and a bustling maritime atmosphere.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
